# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a modern React-based HR management system built with TypeScript, utilizing Supabase as the backend-as-a-service platform. The application follows a component-driven architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Application Structure
- **Frontend**: Single-page application with client-side routing
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Edge Functions + Storage)
- **State Management**: React Query for server state, local component state for UI
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens and Shadcn/ui components

## Key Architectural Decisions

### Component Organization
- **Atomic Design**: UI components organized by complexity (atoms → molecules → organisms)
- **Feature-based Structure**: Components grouped by business domain (attendance/, leave/, payroll/)
- **Shared UI Library**: Shadcn/ui components in `src/components/ui/` for consistency

### Data Flow
- **Supabase Client**: Centralized in `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`
- **Real-time Subscriptions**: Used for live updates on attendance, notifications
- **Optimistic Updates**: React Query mutations with rollback on failure
- **Type Safety**: Generated TypeScript types from Supabase schema

### Authentication & Authorization
- **Supabase Auth**: JWT-based authentication with refresh tokens
- **Role-based Access**: Permission checks via `src/lib/role-access.ts`
- **Mandatory Password Reset**: New users forced to change temporary passwords
- **Session Management**: Automatic token refresh and employee data synchronization

## Core Business Logic

### Attendance Management
- **Time Tracking**: Check-in/check-out with automatic working hours calculation
- **Overtime Rules**: Regular OT (weekday) vs Holiday OT with different rates
- **Anomaly Detection**: Identifies incomplete records, frequent absences, weekend work
- **Reporting**: Monthly summaries with attendance rates, late arrival analysis

### Leave System
- **Leave Types**: Configurable leave categories (annual, sick, maternity, etc.)
- **Balance Tracking**: Automatic calculation of remaining leave days
- **Approval Workflow**: Multi-level approval process with notifications
- **Calendar Integration**: Leave calendar with conflict detection

### Payroll Processing
- **Automated Calculation**: Salary + allowances - deductions
- **Overtime Integration**: OT hours from attendance records
- **Payslip Generation**: PDF generation via Supabase Edge Functions
- **Tax Calculations**: Configurable tax rules and brackets

### Employee Lifecycle
- **Onboarding**: Profile creation with mandatory fields
- **Performance Reviews**: Scheduled evaluations with salary increment proposals
- **Offboarding**: Employee deactivation with data retention

## Key Files & Their Purposes

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap, router setup
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Main dashboard/home page
- `src/App.tsx`: Root component with layout and routing

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main application shell with sidebar and header
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar with role-based menu items
- `src/components/MandatoryPasswordChange.tsx`: Password reset modal for new users
- `src/components/attendance/AttendanceSummary.tsx`: Comprehensive attendance analytics
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx`: Employee search component with avatars

### Utilities & Hooks
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Permission checking functions
- `src/lib/attendance-format.ts`: Time and date formatting for attendance
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts`: Leave balance and calendar calculations
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`: Auto-generated TypeScript types

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Tables
- **employees**: User profiles with auth linkage, company association
- **attendance_records**: Time tracking with calculated fields
- **leave_requests**: Leave applications with approval status
- **payroll_records**: Salary calculations and payslips
- **companies**: Multi-tenant company configurations

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to companies with role-based permissions
- Attendance records link to employees with company scoping
- Leave types and policies configured per company
- Reviews and increments tied to employee performance cycles

## Configuration & Environment

### Build Configuration
- `vite.config.ts`: Vite build setup with React plugin
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Tailwind with custom color palette
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript configuration with path mapping

### Environment Variables
- `VITE_SUPABASE_URL`: Supabase project URL
- `VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY`: Public anon key for client-side auth
- `VITE_SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID`: Project identifier for advanced features

## Development Workflow

### Code Quality
- **ESLint**: Configured in `eslint.config.js` with React and TypeScript rules
- **TypeScript**: Strict mode enabled for type safety
- **Testing**: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E

### Deployment
- **Build Process**: `npm run build` creates optimized production bundle
- **Static Hosting**: Can be deployed to any static host (Vercel, Netlify, etc.)
- **Database**: Supabase handles database and serverless functions

## Security Considerations

- **Row Level Security**: Supabase RLS policies ensure data isolation
- **Authentication**: JWT tokens with automatic refresh
- **Input Validation**: Client and server-side validation
- **File Upload**: Secure file storage with access controls
- **API Security**: Supabase handles API authentication and authorization

## Performance Optimizations

- **Code Splitting**: Vite automatic chunking
- **Image Optimization**: Lazy loading and responsive images
- **Query Optimization**: React Query caching and background refetching
- **Bundle Analysis**: Minimal bundle size with tree shaking

## Scalability Patterns

- **Multi-tenancy**: Company-based data isolation
- **Real-time Updates**: Supabase subscriptions for live features
- **Edge Functions**: Serverless compute for heavy processing (PDF generation, AI parsing)
- **Pagination**: Cursor-based pagination for large datasets

This system is designed to scale from small businesses to large enterprises while maintaining performance and security.
